productName: Seattle Bubble Works Hash Blunt - Trainwreck (S) - 3g
description: A hybrid infused blunt built around Trainwreck and enhanced with extract, blended in for a smooth, even burn and an elevated experience. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of pine, earthy, and woody, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
